programme.desc: Jambval, a terrorist, plans to wreak havoc in Canada during Indian PMÕs visit there. Now, Siddharth, the head of the Indian Anti-Terrorist Squad, must lead his team to uproot JambvalÕs plans and apprehend dreaded terrorist.

programme.title: Bunker

programme.title: Trains, Rockets, and Pains
programme.desc: A harrowing space mistake leaves the solid rocket boosters hanging by a thread.

programme.title: Columbia
programme.desc: The loss of Space Shuttle Columbia stands as one of the worst disasters in spaceflight history.

programme.title: The Story of Energy
programme.desc: Jim investigates a strange set of laws that link together everything from engines to humans to stars.

programme.title: The Story of Information
programme.desc: Jim learns that information isn't just about human communication it's woven into the very fabric of reality.

programme.title: The Assyrians
programme.desc: The Assyrians conquered an empire, plundered Babylon, and enslaved the tribes of Israel.

programme.title: The Celts
programme.desc: The Celts were as wild as the hills they emerged from – so frightening that foes would turn and run from them.

programme.title: The Normans
programme.desc: When the Normans invaded England in 1066, the knights would either win England or be sent to an English grave.

programme.title: The Legions of Rome
programme.desc: Unflinching discipline was the greatest weapon of the world's greatest army of its time – the Roman Legion.

programme.title: The Macedonians
programme.desc: Led by a great general, the Macedonians would forge an empire that stretched from Greece to the Indus River.

programme.title: Soldiers of the Pharaoh
programme.desc: In the 7th century BCE, Egypt was conquered. Out of the ashes rose an army, burning with vengeance.

programme.title: Omsch
programme.desc: A travelling artist, painter and filmmaker has a centenarian neighbour. The relationship between this man in his forties and the solitary old lady with a wicked sense of humour gradually becomes a kind of elective kinship. Their discussions, interrupted and picked up again over the years, form the fabric of this personal, tender and surprising film. A calm observation on the inescapable power of the passage of time.

programme.title: One More Time
programme.desc: An 80-year-old actress returns to the small Chilean town of her youth to fulfill her father's dream of creating a TV channel in a place which has never known television.

programme.title: Othello
programme.desc: The Moorish general Othello is manipulated into thinking that his new wife Desdemona has been carrying on an affair with his lieutenant Michael Cassio when in reality it is all part of the scheme of a bitter ensign named Iago.

programme.title: Our Quarantine
programme.desc: In the port of Cagliari, 16 Moroccan workers are governing a ship. They govern their work. They renounce, voluntarily, on their freedom, hoping to preserve their work and to recover the wages in arrears. The ship is their temporary home, where they sleep, eat, pray, observe Ramadan. In Rome a University teacher has “forced” a young student to follow this story. For reasons of study, but also for reasons of “life”. Maybe Salvatore will learn something by this affair. Or maybe not…

programme.title: Parlor, Bedroom and Bath
programme.desc: A man tries passing off a socially awkward fellow as a Casanova in the hopes of marrying off his would be sister-in-law.

programme.title: Crime Files
programme.desc: It All Begins Around Us This Crime Show Explores Crimes That Occur Within Our Own Communities And Among People We Know. It Tells The Compelling Stories Of Ordinary Lives Disrupted By Crime, With Relatable Characters Representing The World Around Us. The Show'S Mission Is To Raise Awareness About Crime Prevention While Keeping Viewers Engaged And Intrigued."

programme.title: Paapnaashini Ganga
programme.desc: Paapnaashini Ganga Is A Mythological Show Based On The Life Of Goddess Ganga. The Show Takes The Viewers On The Journey Of Birth And Life Of Ganga. The Reason Behind Ganga'S Birth Was To Destruct Evil Entities. The Powers Of Adishakti Made Mainavati Give Birth To A Female Child Who Became Known As Ganga. Devatas Considered Ganga'S Purity As A Weapon Which Could Destroy Evil Asuras. As A Humble & Virtuous Woman, Ganga'S Entire Life Was Full Of Hardships, Which She Led Washing Away The Sins Of All Of Humanity Without Any Discrimination. Ganga Had Sacrificed All Her Desires On The Altar Of Dharma And Led A Divine Life Full Of Welfare Of Humanity. The Show Is Visually Appealing With Strong Vfx Which Will Enhance The Viewers Experience.

programme.title: Bhabhi Ke Pyaare Pritam Hamare
programme.desc: Bhabhi Ke Pyare Pritam Humaare Is A Light-Hearted Celebrity Chat Show Hosted By One Of India'S Most Famous Rj– Pritam Singh. In Each Episode, He Will Welcome Top Female Celebrities From The Entertainment Industry Who Have Played The Roles Of Bhabhi'S & Bahu'S On-Screen, Adding A Pinch Of Glamour To The Show. These Female Celebrities Will Talk About Their Real-World, Tell Their Untold Stories And Reveal How They Live Off-Camera. What'S More? The Episodes Of This Chat Show Will Have An Enthralling Line-Up Of Gag Artists, Activities/Games & Comedy Segments, Along With The Barrel Of Laughs – Pritam.

programme.title: Stories By Rabindranath Tagore
programme.desc: The Characters Of Tagore'S Stories Spring Into Life Through The Cinematic Imagination Of Acclaimed Filmmaker, Anurag Basu In ‘Stories By Rabindranath Tagore'.Tagore'S Words And Basu'S Vision Have Amalgamated Into A Show That Transports You Back In Time To A World As Complicated As This One But With Far More Appeal And Beauty.

programme.title: Dahej Daasi
programme.desc: This Story Is About A 19Year Old Girl Named Chunari, Who Dreams Of Marriage And A Happy Family. However, She Becomes Entangled In The Chains Of Deceit, Finding Herself On The Path To Becoming A Dahej Daasi, Which Is A Tradition Still Prevalent In The Backward Regions Of Rajasthan. The Show Unfolds Into A Compelling Drama Of Tradition Versus Rebellion, Love Versus Oppression.

programme.title: Dhartiputra Nandini
programme.desc: Dhartiputra Nandini Tells The Story Of A Farmer Girl Who Wants To Stay Connected To Her Land. At The Same Time, Akash Returns From America. Sumitra Devi Wishes That His Grandson Akash Should Take Over The Entire Business By Becoming “Ceo.” At The Same Time, Her Family Is Falling Apart, And She Needs An Ideal Daughter-In-Law Who Understands The Responsibility Of Being Her Daughter-In-Law. She Sees Nandini As That, But Akash Refuses To Accept Her Since She Is Not Educated. Nandini Proves That She Is The Best, Both As A Supporter And A Life Partner. She Is There For Akash'S Family In Every Circumstance. This Is The Journey Of “Dhartiputra Nandini” From “Life Partner For Life” To “Charioteer.” In Addition, She Manages His Business. Nandini Also Fulfills Akash'S Dreams And Makes The Name Of The Country Known To The Entire World

programme.title: Agni Vayu
programme.desc: Agni Vayu Is A Romantic Thriller That Tells The Story Of A Young, Vibrant Dr. Agni And An Ambitious Investment Banker Vayu. As Their Love Blossoms, An Unfortunate Turn Of Events Happens That Throws Them Amid Conspiracy, Misunderstanding, Swindling, And All Sorts Of Paradoxes At Every Turn. They Set Out On A Journey To Unravel The Mystery Surrounding These Events. Can They Both Solve It Together And Will They Disclose Their Feelings To Each Other During The Journey.

programme.title: Janani
programme.desc: When Children Are Young, Parents Care For Them And Give Them All They Need To Live A Good Life. The Circle Of Life, However, Means That One Day, It Is The Children'S Turn To Care For Their Parents And Give Them A Happy Retired Life. In The Current Moral Fabric Of Society, Rarely And Not Often It Works Out That Way. It Didn'T Happen That Way With Savita Too, As Her Children Had No Time To Look After Her. So She Decided Not To Settle Out And Reinvent Her Life. She Embarks On A Journey To Discover Herself And To Make Her Own Identity As An Individual. Janani Tells An Inspirational Story Of A Mother Who Rose Against All Odds And Became Successful.

programme.title: Drone Attack
programme.desc: Jerry's mischievous behavior leads to a mess of toys and books scattered around the living room. Jane tries to catch the thrown objects but ends up getting hit herself. However, Jerry realizes Jane's sadness and starts helping her collect the items. They work together, with Jerry attempting to balance a pile of books and Jane using a box to collect the toys. After some mishaps, they successfully gather everyt_hing, but when the box breaks, they find themselves buried under the pile. They laugh together, realizing the joy in their shared experience.

programme.title: Picnic
programme.desc: Jerry grows into a giant after wearing a special ring gadget. Jane tries to evade him but is eventually captured and carried around like a toy. She manages to escape by using the ring to shrink Jerry back to his normal size. They reconcile, and Jane playfully throws the ring away, bringing an end to their giant-sized adventure.

programme.desc: Super Hungry" is a comedic adventure showcasing Jerry's insatiable appetite and Jane's playful attempts to feed him. Jane's idea of using "Hunger Syrup" leads to unexpected consequences as Jerry accidentally consumes the entire bottle, causing his hunger to intensify. programme.title: Live Shows with Savannah
programme.desc: Savannah Zwi is a musician, actress, and artist.Through an innovative, educational experience, the productions expose children to the English language in an enchanting and inventive way. They encourage good moral values, creativity and using your imagination!Beautifully crafted sceneries transport the audience to magical realities and create fantastical memories! Stories are acted out in exquisite costumes with puppets and props which come to life before your eyes and encourage the viewer to use their imagination!The productions feature original handmade sets, captivating vocal performances of original music as well as loved Disney and musical theatre classics, cheeky puppet shows, and inventive storytelling. The Savannah Kids experience enlightens both the spirit and the soul, aiming to bond and delight families entrancing and entertaining, inspiring young minds.

programme.title: OMG! Yeh Mera India
programme.desc: The host meets a man in Punjab who exclusively drives in reverse, checks out the majestic living root bridges of Northeast India and visits temples where people pray for visas and passports.

programme.title: The Egg
programme.desc: Take a look at how eggs move from hen houses to delivery trucks without being touched by human hands. Also, learn how powdered eggs are made.

programme.title: Food Tech
programme.desc: Delving deep into the culture and making of pasta, the host forages the various ingredients required to prepare the delicious Italian dish.

programme.title: Parikrama
programme.desc: A journey to experience the most revered religious sites of India. A spiritual – travel series which unfolds untold stories and takes its viewers on a devotional journey."

programme.title: Sharanam
programme.desc: Sharanam takes viewers on a poignant journey to some of the most revered pilgrimage sites in India to and highlights the traditions, practices, rituals and ideals that bring people to these holy places in search of something greater than themselves. Narrated by Bollywood actress Juhi Chawla, Sharanam showcases testimonies of personal incidents that are the bedrock of the belief, and follows the strong thread of faith that not only binds the pilgrims to their Gods, but also the nation with itself.

programme.title: Adrishya
programme.desc: In battles won and wars lost, there are many lives claimed regardless of the victor. It's not easy to face the perils of warfare even as a trained soldier. But not all wars are won on the battlefield and not all soldiers fight in combat. There are those soldiers who are invisible, unhindered, risking their lives and limbs to protect the honor of their king, country, and home. Adrishya makes you experience life from the point of view of India's greatest spies, living through the danger, the fear, the triumphs and the captures. We see the spy's heroic acts through their eyes and follow them as they travel through dangerous landscapes, slip into disguises, and hoodwink enemy soldiers. We become privy to their thoughts as they inch towards fulfilling their mission.

programme.title: Epic
programme.desc: This show explores stories of travellers from different parts of the world who took a part of India and put it out on the world map. Stories of determination, resilience and falling in love with the idea of India.

programme.title: India Post
programme.desc: The most visible and relatable aspect of a postal system is the postman. Behind this individual, however, there is a massive, intricate organisation that makes it possible for him to bring us joy, hope, news and so much more. We discover the various modes a letter or a package takes through the bowels, nerves and sinews of this system, the technological innovations and igneous processes that make deliveries simpler, faster, more reliable and cost efficient which makes something sent from some of most inaccessible areas in the world reach the metros after raversing the length and breadth of the entire nation to showcase how the world's largest postal network makes home delivery possible.

programme.title: Epic
programme.desc: Epicpedia Is a show about knowing the unknown facts, In this show, amazing facts about India will be presented in 12 webisodes of 5 to 7 minutes each. The show will cover various subjects under History, Science & Technology, Art & Craft, Wildlife, etc. In every episode, you will discover something new, exciting, intriguing, and entertaining about India that you don't know. Like who measured Mount Everest, Did you know Cosmetic Surgery was invented in India thousands of years ago, did you know that the board game Ludo was played in India thousands of Years ago, these and many more facts will be revealed in this show Epicpedia. To sum it up, Epicpedia will present to the audience some hidden jewels of the truth behind India. Facts that are unknown to the best of Indians, they are unique & sometimes stranger than fiction. Epicpedia will satiate your thirst for mysteries, knowledge & unknown facts.

programme.title: Epic
programme.desc: Epic Khoj Communities series highlights the origin, History and evolution of different communities in India and theirvaried cultures, lifestyle values & beliefs and their co-existence.

programme.title: Saamagri Sampatti Aur Sauda
programme.desc: Saamagri Aur Sampatti is an animated series detailing the journey of various commodities that shaped India's history through their trade, usage, and spread. The history of a few key commodities for India, such as pepper, silk, coffee, and cotton, are covered in this fascinating 9-episode series.

programme.title: Veshbhusha
programme.desc: The Great Indian Closet is an infotainment show that delves deep into the topic of indian clothes, inearthing interesting details, information, and facts that trace the origin and evolution of these apparel. The show chronicles the history, culture and traditions associated with some of the most celebrated Indian ethnic wear.

programme.title: Raja Rasoi Aur Anya Kahaniyaan
programme.desc: Raja Rasoi Aur Anya Kahaniyaan is a culinary history show that explores the food of the royals and their erstwhile states. The show takes it's viewers through an amazing journey of anecdotes, folktales, architecture, art, history and landscape and delves into the unique customs and traditions of the various provinces. All these culminate into beautiful renditions of the recipes unique to those regions. This new season of Raja Rasoi aur Anya Kahaniyaan focuses on the royal families as protagonists and explores their personal stories and journeys that shaped their present day food practices.

programme.title: Lost Recipes
programme.desc: Lost Recipes is all about the food which is diffused into the pages of history and the rediscovery of a tradition that once was. Our host Aditya Bal is on a quest to unearth the once-popular culinary traditions through thirteen regions in India.But these recipes are no longer found in cookbooks, old or new, and seem to have evolved with time. Aditya must turn back the clock and wade through folk and lore to find the original, Lost Recipes.

programme.title: Earthrise
programme.desc: Earthrise travels to Bangladesh and Australia, to visit two projects that have found ways for humans and animals to live better together on our shared planet.

programme.title: Earthrise
programme.desc: We explore the environmental consequences of war and how different people, from Rohingya refugees to Syrian scientists, are trying to restore a healthy relationship with nature.

programme.title: Earthrise
programme.desc: We explore potential new strategies to satisfy the growing food demand, from restaurants growing potatoes in the air to jellyfish as a potential sustainable meat alternative.

programme.title: Earthrise
programme.desc: We meet grassroots movements in US and UK who are fighting for a political intervention to stop climate change.

programme.title: Earthrise
programme.desc: We meet enviro-entrepreneurs who recycle plastic waste to produce a large variety of items from fishing boats to coffee cups.

programme.title: Earthrise

programme.title: Xploration DIY Sci
programme.desc: Steve Spangler creates science toys, tricks and experiments that you can make using simple things you can find in your kitchen.

programme.title: World's Wildest City: Anchorage
programme.desc: Anchorage is home to a huge number of porcupines, living in the city's streets, gardens and parks. But life on the streets also takes its toll. Porcupines are the city's number one roadkill.

programme.title: Python Hunters
programme.desc: The Python Hunters decide to tackle the debate over how the Burmese Pythons came to be established in the Everglades.

programme.title: Super Senses
programme.desc: We find out about the animals that live in the shadows and the adaptations they need to survive. Nocturnal animals have taken to this dark world for good reason. You need some special abilities to cope with the lack of light.

programme.title: Super Senses
programme.desc: We find out more about the animals that have their feet firmly planted on or under the ground. And find out how their senses are tuned to survive. What we see above the ground is only a small part of the natural world.

programme.title: Super Senses
programme.desc: Animals use communication to attract mates,warn off predators, defend territory, or trick their prey. And of course, it's the senses that play the key role - Sight, smell, taste, touch, and hearing - all are employed to send signals to others.

programme.title: Super Senses
programme.desc: In this last episode of Super Senses we take the grand final tour to see the greatest of all the special weapons that help some animals to govern the wilderness. In this episode we see it, hear it, touch it, smell it and taste it like animals do.

programme.title: Wild Walk
programme.desc: The baboon human conflict in the western cape has taken an ugly turn with many of the cape peninsulas chacmas either being trapped and relocated or killed. Swati walks with baboons to find out what is causing this conflict and to look for solutions

programme.title: Wild Walk
programme.desc: Can wilderness be brought back to a land that has been overgrazed and farmed? The Karoo was once extensive across south Africa and home to a rich diversity of flora and fauna. Swati takes a wild walk there to see if the conservation plan is working

programme.title: Wild Walk
programme.desc: Can captive bred ambassador cheetahs of the Cheetah Outreach in Cape Town can help save their counterparts in the wild? Swati finds out if the motto of Cheetah Outreach, see it, Sense it, Save it, can help the wild cheetah?

programme.title: Wild Walk
programme.desc: Can the African elephant evers be tamed? Is it possible to sustain an entire tourism industry based on them being domesticated? Swati walks with the elephants of Knysna park while these questions are asked.

programme.title: Wild And Alive
programme.desc: Five critically endangered African species find protection in one modest haven - De Hoop Nature reserve is not only a World heritage Site it's also incredibly important for the survival of these iconic animal.

programme.desc: On the shores of the Sea of Galilee, also called the Lake of Tiberias, discover a freshwater lake with an area of 166 m2 located in the North-East of Israel. programme.title: Budapest Inner-City Mother Church of the Blessed Virgin, Hungary
programme.desc: Budapest, Hungary's capital, is one of the largest and most populous cities in Europe. Budapest's modern city unites Buda, Obuda, and Pest's, three ancient settlements connected in 1873. The Church of the Blessed Virgin Mary is located in the city's very heart on the Elizabeth Bridge's Pest side. It is the oldest Catholic Church in the city and dates back to 1040. Also called the Inner City Parish Church, or the Parish Church of the city, it was raised on a rectangular warehouse ruin from the Roman settlement time.

programme.title: Monastery of Saint Irene, Andros, Cyclade Island, Greece
programme.desc: Discover a Greek heritage in Andros: The Monastery of Saint Irene, a philanthropist's work which glorifies the cultural heritage of Andros: an architectural heritage and a philosophical one.

programme.title: Blue Monastery, Georgia
programme.desc: One of the most important monuments of Tbilissi is the Lurji Monastery.The complex is often referred to as Blue monastery which derived from its roof, adorned with glazed blue tile. The church stands in the central part of the city, at the Vere Park, on t"&"he right bank of the Mtkvari river not far from the mouth of the Vere River.

programme.title: Cathedral La Major, France
programme.desc: Just on the outskirts of the delightfully vibrant Marseille, lies what locals affectionately call the Cathedral of La Major. An impressive Roman Catholic cathedral and basilica minor, this astounding architectural gem stands guard over the Old-Port of Marseille. It is a respected, protected much loved-national monument of France: The Cathedral of Sainte-Marie-Majeure, or The Major as locals called it.

programme.title: Holy Trinity Cathedral, Ethiopia
programme.desc: Addis Ababa, Ethiopia's capital and largest city, is a buzzing hub of economic, social, and political activity with an energetic and eclectic personality and style all its own in Africa. This historic city is dotted with extraordinary examples of art and "&"architecture that include museums, cathedrals, and various complexes. One of such amusing architectural gems of the city is the Holy Trinity Cathedral
